name: BMI Calculator
description: A clean and modern BMI Calculator for checking your health stats uniquely.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com
